summary: Comprehensive testing of Mantras and Ho'oponopono pages. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test custom mantras during backend and UI testing (TEST_UI_SaveMantra)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mantras and Ho'oponopono pages fully tested. All CRUD operations for custom mantras work. Mantra library returns 10 mantras with proper structure. Ho'oponopono session cycles through 4 phrases correctly. Navigation via 'More' dropdown works for both pages.

library_mode.category_filters: ✓ All, Meditation, Compassion, Devotion, Healing, Peace, Illumination filters work
library_mode.mantra_cards: ✓ Cards display name, text, meaning, category, chakra, reps
library_mode.detail_panel: ✓ Opens on card click with full info, benefits, practice tips

mantra_session.controls: ✓ Pause, Reset, End Session buttons work

build_your_own.unauthenticated: ✓ Shows 'Sign in to create custom mantra practices' prompt
build_your_own.authenticated: ✓ Shows full builder UI with saved mantras
build_your_own.form_fields: ✓ Mantra text, name, meaning inputs work
build_your_own.ambient_sound: ✓ Silence, Singing Bowls, Ocean, Forest, Wind options
build_your_own.save_practice: ✓ Saves to database and shows in list
build_your_own.saved_mantras: ✓ Displays with Begin Practice and delete options

hooponopono_page.phrase_cards: ✓ 4 phrase cards displayed (I'm sorry, Please forgive me, Thank you, I love you)

target_selection.person: ✓ A Specific Person target shows name input
target_selection.situation: ✓ A Situation target shows description input

hooponopono_session.breathing_orb: ✓ Animated breathing orb with phrase color
hooponopono_session.controls: ✓ Pause and End Session buttons work

navigation.more_dropdown: ✓ Mantras and Ho'oponopono links in More dropdown

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/mantras/save-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (saves custom mantra)
GET /api/mantras/my-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns user's custom mantras)
DELETE /api/mantras/custom/{id} - 401 without auth, 200 with auth, 404 for nonexistent
